system.sensesNotes: Darkvision 60 ft, Blindsight 10 ft (in water only)
system.specialAbilitiesNotes:
Droplet

Threat Rating: 1/8 Origin: Elemental (Water) Size: Tiny HP: 10 (Con 2 × 5, Fragile) DR: 0 Speed: 20 ft, Swim 30 ft Attributes: Str 1 / Con 2 / Agi 4 / Dex 3 / Int 1 / Wis 2 / Cha 1 / Luck 2 Skills: Melee Combat 1, Perception 2, Stealth 2 Senses: Darkvision 60 ft, Blindsight 10 ft (in water only) Initiative Bonus: +4 (Agi 4) Creature Type: Elemental — Immune to cold damage, poison damage, Poisoned, disease, exhaustion, Paralyzed, Petrified, Unconscious. Does not need air, food, drink, or sleep.

Attacks:

  • Splash [Combat]: Ranged attack (Dex 3 + Ranged Combat 1), Range: 10 ft
    • Margin 1: 1 damage; target gains Dazzled condition until end of their next turn from water in the eyes
    • Margin 2: 2 damage + 2 cold damage (Half DR); target makes Reflex save (1 success) or drops a loosely held item from the wet grip

Special Abilities:

  • Aqueous Form: Fits through any gap water can pass through. An undisturbed Droplet in clear water requires a Hard task Perception check (2 successes) to notice by sight.
  • Contaminate: Over 1 minute of contact, makes a body of liquid foul-tasting, cloudy, or cold. Not harmful but detectable with a Perception or Medicine check (1 success).

Description: Droplets are utility and infiltration. They slip under doors, into sealed containers, through arrow slits. They can confirm whether a cistern is the water supply for a building, whether a moat is deep, or whether something is already living in a well. Their combat contribution is negligible. A summoner who understands what a Droplet actually is will find it useful in ways that have nothing to do with fighting.

---

Tide Wisp

Threat Rating: 1/4 Origin: Elemental (Water) Size: Small HP: 12 (Con 2 × 6, Fragile) DR: 0 Speed: 20 ft, Swim 40 ft Attributes: Str 2 / Con 2 / Agi 5 / Dex 4 / Int 2 / Wis 3 / Cha 1 / Luck 2 Skills: Melee Combat 2, Perception 3, Stealth 3, Athletics 2 Senses: Darkvision 60 ft, Blindsight 30 ft (in water) Initiative Bonus: +5 (Agi 5) Creature Type: Elemental — Immune to cold damage, poison damage, Poisoned, disease, exhaustion, Paralyzed, Petrified, Unconscious. Does not need air, food, drink, or sleep.

Attacks:

  • Water Tendril [Combat]: Melee attack (Agi 5 + Melee Combat 2), Reach: 10 ft
    • Margin 1: 3 damage (Small, standard: 4 − 1) + 2 cold damage (Half DR)
    • Margin 2: 5 damage (3 + 2 Str) + 2 cold damage; target gains Chilled condition
    • Margin 3: 5 damage + 2 cold damage; target gains Numbed condition

Special Abilities:

  • Slick Trail: When the Tide Wisp moves across a surface, that surface becomes Difficult Terrain for other creatures until the start of the Wisp's next turn.
  • Aqueous Form: As Droplet.

Description: Tide Wisps create area denial using Slick Trail and harass from reach with their tendril. In water they outpace most of what they fight and exploit that speed to avoid retaliation. On land they are less effective but useful for placing Difficult Terrain at chokepoints or approaches. A Cooperative Tide Wisp will use Slick Trail to protect the summoner's position rather than chasing targets — a reasonable instinct that benefits from explicit instruction to confirm.

---

Current Stalker

Threat Rating: 1/2 Origin: Elemental (Water) Size: Medium HP: 27 (Con 3 × 9, Tough) DR: 2 (dense water-form) Speed: 20 ft, Swim 50 ft Attributes: Str 4 / Con 3 / Agi 5 / Dex 4 / Int 2 / Wis 3 / Cha 1 / Luck 2 Skills: Melee Combat 4, Perception 4, Stealth 4, Athletics 3 Senses: Darkvision 60 ft, Blindsight 60 ft (in water) Initiative Bonus: +5 (Agi 5) Creature Type: Elemental — Immune to cold damage, poison damage, Poisoned, disease, exhaustion, Paralyzed, Petrified, Unconscious. Does not need air, food, drink, or sleep.

Attacks:

  • Cold Lash [Combat]: Melee attack (Agi 5 + Melee Combat 4), Reach: 10 ft
    • Margin 1: 4 damage (standard natural) + 4 cold damage (Half DR)
    • Margin 2: 8 damage (4 + 4 Str) + 4 cold damage; target's movement speed reduced by 10 until end of their next turn
    • Margin 3: 8 damage + 4 cold damage; target gains Numbed condition; movement speed reduced by 20 until end of their next turn

Special Abilities:

  • Water Mastery: In water, attacks against the Current Stalker add 1 to both dice. Its Cold Lash reach extends to 15 ft while in water.
  • Aqueous Form: As Droplet.
  • Drag Under (Recharge 5-8) [Combat]: When adjacent to a creature, attempts to pull them into any adjacent body of water. Opposed check: Agi 5 + Athletics 3 vs. target's Athletics or Acrobatics. On failure, target moved up to 10 feet into the water and gains the Grappled condition while submerged.

Description: Current Stalkers are dramatically more effective in water than away from it. In water they are fast, harder to hit, and use Drag Under to pull enemies into their preferred environment where the fight becomes considerably more one-sided. On dry ground they slow enemies and apply cold conditions at reach. A summoner who deploys them near water and uses Drag Under to establish positioning will find them capable well above their TR suggests. One who calls them into a building and expects the same performance will be disappointed.

---

Wave Breaker

Threat Rating: 1 Origin: Elemental (Water) Size: Large HP: 56 (Con 4 × 14, Tough) DR: 3 (dense water-shell) Speed: 20 ft, Swim 60 ft Attributes: Str 6 / Con 4 / Agi 4 / Dex 3 / Int 3 / Wis 3 / Cha 2 / Luck 3 Skills: Melee Combat 5, Might 5, Perception 4, Athletics 4 Senses: Darkvision 60 ft, Blindsight 60 ft (in water) Initiative Bonus: +4 (Agi 4) Creature Type: Elemental — Immune to cold damage, poison damage, Poisoned, disease, exhaustion, Paralyzed, Petrified, Unconscious. Does not need air, food, drink, or sleep.

Attacks:

  • Crashing Slam [Combat]: Melee attack (Agi 4 + Melee Combat 5), Reach: 10 ft
    • Margin 1: 10 damage (Large, standard: 8 + 2) + 4 cold damage (Half DR); target pushed 5 feet
    • Margin 2: 16 damage (10 + 6 Str) + 4 cold damage; target pushed 10 feet and knocked Prone; no save
    • Margin 3: 16 damage + 4 cold damage + Prone; target gains Numbed condition
  • Water Jet [Combat]: Ranged attack (Dex 3 + Ranged Combat 3), Range: 30 ft, 5-foot-wide line
    • Net 1: 8 cold damage (Half DR); creatures in line make Fortitude save (1 success) or pushed 10 feet. Net 2: 16 cold damage; pushed 15 feet; no save. Net 3: 16 cold damage + Frosted condition; no save.

Special Abilities:

  • Engulf (Recharge 6-8) [Combat]: Surges over one Medium or smaller creature within 5 feet. Target makes a Reflex save (compare Agi 4 + Melee Combat 5 vs. save successes). On failure: Grappled, Restrained, takes 8 cold damage per round. Fortitude save each round (Hard task, 2 successes) to break free, or an ally can spend 2 [Interact] actions to pull them clear.
  • Water Mastery: As Current Stalker.

Description: Wave Breakers use Water Jet to clear lines and apply cold conditions, then close to melee. Engulf is their best option — used on a single priority target when the angle appears. In water they are substantially faster and more capable. A summoner who draws enemies near a water source before a Wave Breaker surfaces will find the encounter resolved more efficiently than the TR suggests is reasonable.

---

Deep Tide

Threat Rating: 2 Origin: Elemental (Water) Size: Large HP: 76 (Con 4 × 19, Massive) DR: 4 (ocean-depth water-shell) Speed: 20 ft, Swim 70 ft Attributes: Str 6 / Con 4 / Agi 4 / Dex 4 / Int 3 / Wis 4 / Cha 2 / Luck 3 Skills: Melee Combat 6, Might 5, Perception 5, Athletics 5 Senses: Darkvision 60 ft, Blindsight 120 ft (in water) Initiative Bonus: +4 (Agi 4) Creature Type: Elemental — Immune to cold damage, poison damage, Poisoned, disease, exhaustion, Paralyzed, Petrified, Unconscious. Does not need air, food, drink, or sleep.

Attacks:

  • Slam [Combat]: Melee attack (Agi 4 + Melee Combat 6), Reach: 10 ft
    • Margin 1: 10 damage (Large, standard: 8 + 2) + 4 cold damage (Half DR); target pushed 5 feet
    • Margin 2: 16 damage (10 + 6 Str) + 4 cold damage; target knocked Prone; no save
    • Margin 3: 16 damage + 4 cold damage + Prone; target gains Numbed condition
  • Cold Surge [Combat]: Ranged attack (Dex 4 + Ranged Combat 4), Range: 40 ft
    • Margin 1: 8 cold damage (Half DR); target gains Chilled
    • Margin 2: 12 cold damage (8 + 4 Dex); target gains Numbed
    • Margin 3: 12 cold damage + Frosted condition; target's next [Move] action costs an additional action

Special Abilities:

  • Engulf (Recharge 5-8) [Combat]: As Wave Breaker, but damage increases to 12 cold per round. Grappled creature must succeed on a Fortitude save (Hard task, 2 successes) each round or gain 1 Exhaustion level from crushing pressure and cold.
  • Crushing Current: When the Deep Tide hits a Grappled creature with any attack, that creature takes an additional 8 cold damage (Half DR) from water pressure.
  • Water Mastery: As above.

Description: Deep Tides prioritize Engulf and build toward it through Slam attacks that accumulate Prone and cold conditions. Cold Surge handles targets trying to stay at range or retreat while the primary target is being held. In water they are apex predators at this tier — Crushing Current makes Engulfed targets suffer severely for every action the Deep Tide spends attacking them. A summoner who has terrain control and patience will find Deep Tides considerably more effective than fighting them straight suggests.

---

Abyssal Surge

Threat Rating: 3 Origin: Elemental (Water) Size: Huge HP: 144 (Con 6 × 24, Tough) DR: 5 (ocean-trench water-shell) Speed: 20 ft, Swim 80 ft Attributes: Str 7 / Con 6 / Agi 5 / Dex 5 / Int 4 / Wis 5 / Cha 3 / Luck 4 Skills: Melee Combat 7, Might 6, Perception 6, Athletics 6 Senses: Darkvision 60 ft, Blindsight 300 ft (in water) Initiative Bonus: +5 (Agi 5) Creature Type: Elemental — Immune to cold damage, poison damage, Poisoned, disease, exhaustion, Paralyzed, Petrified, Unconscious. Does not need air, food, drink, or sleep.

Attacks:

  • Crushing Wave [Combat]: Melee attack (Agi 5 + Melee Combat 7), Reach: 15 ft
    • Margin 1: 14 damage (Huge, standard: 12 + 2) + 6 cold damage (Half DR); target pushed 10 feet
    • Margin 2: 21 damage (14 + 7 Str) + 6 cold damage; target knocked Prone + Numbed condition; no save
    • Margin 3: 21 damage + 6 cold damage + Prone + Frosted; target Grappled as the wave wraps around them
  • Pressurized Jet [Combat]: Ranged attack (Dex 5 + Ranged Combat 5), Range: 60 ft
    • Margin 1: 12 cold damage (Half DR); target pushed 10 feet
    • Margin 2: 20 cold damage (12 + ... Dex 5 + base); target pushed 15 feet + Frosted; no save
    • Margin 3: 20 cold damage + Frosted + Restrained by a column of pressurized water for 1 round; Fortitude save (Hard task, 2 successes) to move through it

Special Abilities:

  • Tidal Surge (Recharge 5-8) [Combat]: Sends a 60-foot cone of pressurized water in a chosen direction. All creatures in the cone make a Reflex save. Compare Agi 5 + Melee Combat 7 targeting vs. each save. Net 1: 20 cold damage (Half DR) + pushed 20 feet. Net 2: 32 cold damage + pushed 30 feet + Prone. Net 3: 32 cold damage + pushed 30 feet + Prone + Frosted condition.
  • Engulf (Recharge 5-8) [Combat]: As Deep Tide, but can target up to 2 Medium or 1 Large creature simultaneously.
  • Water Mastery: In water, Abyssal Surge attacks cannot have their damage reduced by Reflex saves — targets take full damage on any net success.
  • Resilient Defense (2/day).

Description: Abyssal Surges open with Tidal Surge to scatter enemy formations, then spend subsequent actions building Grapples through Crushing Wave while Pressurized Jet handles anything trying to disengage. Engulf removes priority targets from the engagement. In water, the Water Mastery suppression of Reflex saves makes them genuinely terrifying — everything takes full cold damage regardless of how well enemies roll. A summoner who deploys one near a sea, lake, or river should be aware that the Abyssal Surge will attempt to drag the fight into that water without prompting. That is simply what it is.

---

Ocean Lord

Threat Rating: 4 Origin: Elemental (Water) Size: Huge HP: 180 (Con 6 × 30, Massive) DR: 6 (deep-current water-shell) Speed: 20 ft, Swim 100 ft Attributes: Str 8 / Con 6 / Agi 5 / Dex 6 / Int 5 / Wis 6 / Cha 4 / Luck 5 Skills: Melee Combat 7, Might 7, Perception 7, Athletics 7 Senses: Darkvision 60 ft, Blindsight 1 mile (in water) Initiative Bonus: +5 (Agi 5) Creature Type: Elemental — Immune to cold damage, poison damage, Poisoned, disease, exhaustion, Paralyzed, Petrified, Unconscious. Does not need air, food, drink, or sleep.

Attacks:

  • Abyssal Strike [Combat]: Melee attack (Agi 5 + Melee Combat 7), Reach: 15 ft
    • Margin 1: 14 damage (Huge, standard: 12 + 2) + 8 cold damage (Half DR); target pushed 15 feet + knocked Prone; no save
    • Margin 2: 22 damage (14 + 8 Str) + 8 cold damage; Prone + Frosted + Grappled; no save
    • Margin 3: 22 damage + 8 cold damage + Prone + Frosted + Grappled + Restrained; ongoing 16 cold damage per round while Grappled
  • Pressurized Stream [Combat]: Ranged attack (Dex 6 + Ranged Combat 7), Range: 120 ft
    • Net 1: 20 cold damage (Half DR). Net 2: 32 cold damage + Frosted + Restrained by pressurized water column for 1 round. Net 3: 32 cold damage + Frozen condition; no save.

Special Abilities:

  • Maelstrom (1/encounter) [Combat]: As 2 [Combat] actions, creates a 40-foot radius vortex of pressurized water. All creatures in range make Athletics or Acrobatics checks (Hard task, 2 successes) or dragged 20 feet toward the center and knocked Prone. Creatures reaching the center are Grappled and take 16 cold damage per round. Creatures starting their turn in range must check again. Designated allies immune. Lasts 1 minute.
  • Water Mastery: As Abyssal Surge; also immune to fire damage in addition to cold.
  • Engulf (Recharge 5-8): As Abyssal Surge.
  • Resilient Defense (3/day).

Description: Ocean Lords open with Maelstrom to immediately cluster enemies, then use Abyssal Strike to lock specific targets into Grapples while the vortex handles everything else. Pressurized Stream freezes high-priority targets that manage to stay at range. A Friendly Ocean Lord coordinates complex engagement sequences without repeated instruction — it understands the shape of a fight well enough to anticipate what the summoner needs next. The Ocean Lord wants to pull everything into deep water. Giving it permission to pursue that agenda is simply a matter of telling it which targets matter most.

---

Primordial Wave

Threat Rating: 5 Origin: Elemental (Water) Size: Huge HP: 216 (Con 6 × 36, Massive) DR: 7 (world-ocean shell) Speed: 20 ft, Swim 120 ft Attributes: Str 8 / Con 6 / Agi 6 / Dex 7 / Int 6 / Wis 7 / Cha 5 / Luck 6 Skills: Melee Combat 8, Might 8, Perception 8, Athletics 8 Senses: Darkvision 60 ft, Blindsight 5 miles (in water) Initiative Bonus: +6 (Agi 6) Creature Type: Elemental — Immune to cold damage, fire damage, poison damage, Poisoned, disease, exhaustion, Paralyzed, Petrified, Unconscious. Does not need air, food, drink, or sleep.

Attacks:

  • World Current [Combat]: Melee attack (Agi 6 + Melee Combat 8), Reach: 20 ft
    • Margin 1: 16 damage (Huge, heavy natural: 14 + 2) + 12 cold damage (Half DR); Prone + Frosted; no save
    • Margin 2: 24 damage (16 + 8 Str) + 12 cold damage; Prone + Frozen + Grappled; ongoing 24 cold damage per round while Grappled
    • Margin 3: 24 damage + 12 cold damage + Frozen + Grappled + immediately Engulfed; Blinded + Restrained + doubled ongoing damage to 48
  • Ocean's Wrath [Combat]: Ranged attack (Dex 7 + Ranged Combat 8), Range: 200 ft, 20-foot radius
    • Per creature in radius: Net 1: 24 cold damage (Half DR). Net 2: 40 cold damage + Frosted. Net 3: 40 cold damage + Frozen condition; no save.

Special Abilities:

  • World Tide (1/day) [Combat]: As 2 [Combat] actions, calls a tidal surge across a 100-foot radius. Every non-designated creature not flying makes a Fortitude save (Hard task, 2 successes). Failure: 48 cold damage + Prone + Frozen for 1 hour. 1 success: 24 damage + Prone. 2 successes: 12 damage. Terrain in the radius becomes Difficult Terrain for 1 hour. Creates enough water to flood a significant area on natural ground.
  • Water Mastery: In water, the Primordial Wave is immune to all damage except Positive energy and magical fire. On land, normal immunities apply.
  • Cold Immunity Sharing: The summoner and up to 4 designated allies are immune to non-magical cold damage while within 60 feet.
  • Maelstrom (1/encounter): As Ocean Lord.
  • Resilient Defense (3/day).

Description: A Primordial Wave at war is the ocean deciding to fight. World Tide resets the battlefield on arrival. World Current removes individuals with a single attack that Engulfs at Margin 3. Ocean's Wrath handles grouped formations at extreme range. In any environment with significant water it becomes effectively impossible to stop without overwhelming magical force — Water Mastery in that context grants near-total immunity to conventional damage. A summoner who calls one knows they are not deploying a creature. They are opening a door, and what comes through it intends to stay.

---
